text.title: Weekly GSC Diagnostic Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Site has ≥50 ranking pages AND GSC verified ≥30 days?

branch.question: Founder has ≥60 min for the review this week?
